organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

companyResolutionResult.description:
Cytactic is an Al-powered platform for Cybersecurity Incident Response Management (CIRM), a new category introduced by Gartner.

Cytactic has been recognized by Gartner as a representative vendor in the CIRM category and was also named one of Fortune’s Top 50 Cybersecurity Companies for 2025. 

Cytactic's CIRM platform spans the full cyber incident lifecycle, from planning and cross-team onboarding, through scenarios and tabletop exercises (TTXs), and with real-time incident management when a crisis hits. It brings together AI-guided recommendations, dynamic workflows, and collaboration tools that reduce chaos, accelerate decisions, and minimize business, operational and reputational impact. Most importantly, it transforms incident response from a reactive scramble into a disciplined, repeatable, measurable practice.
companyResolutionResult.name: Cytactic

companyResolutionResult.description:
Fireblocks is the world's most trusted digital asset infrastructure company, empowering organizations of all sizes to build, manage, and grow their business on the blockchain.

With the industry's most scalable and secure platform, Fireblocks streamlines stablecoin payments, settlement, custody, tokenization, and trading operations across the largest ecosystem of banks, payment providers, stablecoin issuers, exchanges, and custodians.

More than 2,200 organizations including Worldpay, BNY Mellon, Galaxy, and Revolut trust Fireblocks to secure over $10 trillion in digital asset transactions across 100 blockchains.

Fireblocks provides the infrastructure that powers financial possibility. We help institutions unlock new use cases, deliver real-world value, and scale securely in the onchain economy.

Fireblocks operates globally with offices in the United States, United Kingdom, Israel, Hong Kong, Singapore, Germany, France, and Switzerland.

To stay up to date, follow us on X @FireblocksHQ or visit our blog for the latest company news - https://www.fireblocks.com/blog/
companyResolutionResult.name: Fireblocks

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Afeka Tel Aviv Academic College of Engineering
Welcome to the Afeka Tel Aviv Academic College of Engineering!

Located at the heart of the Israeli high-tech industry in Tel Aviv, the Afeka Academic College of Engineering has positioned itself as one of the leading institutions for engineering studies in Israel. Afeka offers a strong and cutting-edge academic program that produces highly skilled and professional engineers. The exceptional level of training, coupled with Afeka's strong ties to the industry, paves the way for Afeka graduates to position themselves at the forefront of the Israeli and International engineering community.

The Afeka Academic College of Engineering is accredited by the Israel Council for Higher Education and offers B.Sc. degrees in the following fields of engineering:

Medical Engineering
Electrical Engineering
Mechanical Engineering
Industrial Engineering and Management
Software Engineering
Computer Science
Data Science


M.Sc. Program in:
Medical Engineering
Intelligent Systems
Systems Engineering
Energy and Power Systems Engineering
Industrial engineering and management

resumePosition.details:
• Applied principles from the MITRE ATT&CK framework to conduct targeted threat hunts.
• Leveraged advanced threat intelligence and indicators of compromise (IoCs) to proactively identify potential risks.
• Built and maintained an automated threat-hunting process using various query-based languages.
• Led the Forensics and Incident Response team in responding to numerous cyberattacks on sensitive networks.
• Utilized endpoint security solutions with a focus on EDR to analyze anomalous traffic and security threats.
• Expertise in working with SIEM systems to streamline SOC operations in both cloud and on-premises environments.
• Served as the main source for Tier 2 and Tier 3 events, utilizing various SIEM tools.
• Implemented and managed security configurations and policies within Azure cloud environments.
• Conducted regular vulnerability assessments and recommended mitigation strategies by leveraging CSPM platforms.
• In-depth knowledge of network architecture and communication protocols.
• Experience with both cloud infrastructure and on-premises networks.

• Designed and implemented scalable ETL pipelines in TypeScript (Node.
• js) and PHP, following microservices architecture principles.
• Implemented an AI-driven AIOps observability service (Node.
• js, LangChain.
• js) integrating Prometheus metrics and OpenTelemetry traces.
• Developed event-driven services utilizing Kafka and RabbitMQ to enable asynchronous, decoupled workflows.

• Connect to the database container of Postgres DB using Hibernate ORM.

• As Part of the team responsible for the Autonomous Car Lab at the IEM department Develop new features and full-stack applications using Python, C#, SQL and JavaScript.
• Develop a GUI using KIVY - Python and Windows Form Application in C#.
• Provide system integration service at the Autonomous Car Lab in the Industrial Engineering Department.

The Hebrew University of Jerusalem is Israel's first university, formed in 1918 and opened in 1925. Today, there are over 23,000 students enrolled at the University, including undergraduates, master's degree students, and doctoral candidates.

The university has four campuses: Mount Scopus, The Edmond J. Safra (Givat Ram) Campus, and Ein Kerem (in Jerusalem), and Rehovot.

Hebrew University Alumni are invited to visit https://alumni.huji.ac.il

companyResolutionResult.description:
Israel Aerospace Industries Ltd. (IAI) is Israel’s largest aerospace and defense company specializing in developing and manufacturing advanced, state-of-the-art systems for air, space, sea, land, cyber and homeland security.

Over the past 60 years IAI delivered, supplied and supported advanced systems for the Israeli Ministry of Defense as well as many demanding customers worldwide. 

As a national center of excellence for advanced technological fields IAI maintains extensive research and development (R&D), engineering, manufacturing and testing capabilities to develop, produce and support complete systems, from the component, sensor and sub system to large scale integrated systems, support systems of expertise. This capability is also reflected by the company's manpower - IAI is the largest employer of engineers in Israel; R&D makes about a quarter of the company's annual budget. 

IAI strives to be a world leader in all of its main areas of activity.

* Satellites and Space Systems
* Defense Systems, Missiles and Loitering Weapons
* Special Mission and Early Warning Aircrafts
* Unmanned Aerial Systems (UAS)
* BTP and BTS international subcontracting and co-production programs, including manufacturing of numerous major assemblies for Boeing 777 & 787 programs
* Radar and Electronic Intelligence
* Passengers to Freighter Aircraft Conversions
* Command and Control Strategic Systems
* Cyber Solutions
* Robotics
* Aircraft, Aerostructure and systems serving the commercial aerospace markets
* Business Jets- IAI is currently part of the final assembly line of Gulfstream Business Jet family
companyResolutionResult.name: IAI - Israel Aerospace Industries

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
An institution of Higher Education, Kinneret Academic Collegehas been promoting a multicultural educational philosophy, social involvement and development of the region for over 50 years.
Founded in 1965 on the shores of the Sea of Galilee, today students
study for B.A., M.A., B.Sc. and M.Sc. degrees in the Faculty of Social Sciences and Humanities and the Achi Racov Faculty of Engineering.
A dynamic student body is guided by experienced and dedicated faculty and the College has become a thriving academic center. Rigorous academic standards prepare students to enter the workforce and academic life is balanced with practical application. Fostering diversity and an intellectual environment, Kinneret Academic College produces the next generation of leaders and advances tomorrow’s thinking.
A key player in the northern periphery, students experience world-class study
programs in one of the most beautiful places in Israel. Students, alumni and academic staff all enrich the region; establishing and maintaining connections with industries locally as well as abroad.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Kinneret Academic College

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
ORT colleges are part of ORT Israel, which was established in 1949 and now includes 150 educational institutions. The network trains students to cope with the accelerated rate of development in the economy and in industry.

ORT colleges devise study curricula adapted to the needs of the country and to future needs, in collaboration with other bodies, such as: the Ministry of Science and Technology, the Ministry of Industry, Trade & Employment, the IDF, high-tech industries and other leading industries in the national economy, both in the private and public sectors.

Our graduates are integrated in the employment market in a wide range of key positions, in high-tech industries, other leading industries, government ministries, in the private market and in a large number of places of employment that require high quality professionals in the technological fields, at all levels.

ORT colleges operate as interdisciplinary education centers, ranging from science and technology studies to the arts, design and communications. The colleges aim to provide a solution for every student, enabling them to successfully meet local and global technological requirements.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: ORT Colleges

currentPositions.description:
Experienced Quality Engineer in the medical device industry, with hands-on involvement in quality assurance processes, regulatory compliance, and cross-functional system support.

Key Responsibilities:

Leading the management of DCOs and ECOs.

Performing incoming inspections to ensure compliance with specifications.

Managing the NCR and CAPA processes from initiation to closure.

Participating in and leading MRB (Material Review Board) processes, including cross-functional disposition decisions and documentation.

Reviewing and approving DHRs for batch release, labels, and route cards.

Participating in internal and external audits, including FDA inspections and audits under ISO 13485, EU MDR, and MDSAP.

Writing, maintaining, and improving QA procedures to align with quality and regulatory requirements.

Managing QA training processes, including implementation and support of the LMS (Learning Management System).

Responsible for employee training records, system setup, effectiveness checks, and regulatory compliance regarding employee qualification.

Validating route cards to ensure accuracy and traceability
currentPositions.title: QA Engineer

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
The Open University is an expert in flexible higher education that fits around your working life.

We don’t make you choose between a degree and a salary – more than 76% of our students are in full or part time work, while 86% FTSE 100 companies have funded staff on OU courses.

Employers including IBM, The Metropolitan Police, Unilever and many more recognise the value for money we provide, while students appreciate the range of affordable routes we offer. As a result, we are the largest academic institution in the UK, with nearly 180,000 current undergraduates, postgraduates and students on validated programmes - plus almost 1.8 million who have studied with us since our foundation in 1969.

When you join the OU, you gain a vast international network of support from university staff, alumni and fellow students (including more than 15,000 overseas) with a truly global reach. Wherever you are based, we offer flexible study with structure and support and we have been rated in the top ten UK universities for student satisfaction in the National Student Survey since its foundation in 2005.

Our commitment to distance learning and access to education enables us to cater for the widest range of students - not only those who are in paid work but also the retired, those returning to education, registered carers, single parents and more disabled people than any other UK-based university.

Flexible, affordable, respected and connected. Don’t take our word for it: Listen to what our students say at www.youtube.com/user/OUlife or click on the ‘Recommendations’ tab at the top of this page.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Reichman University (previously IDC Herzliya), the first private institution of higher education in Israel, opened its doors in 1994 thanks to the vision of Prof. Uriel Reichman. Reichman University's ten schools offer innovative, dynamic undergraduate and graduate programs that educate Israel's future business, juridical, high-tech, communications, economics, and civic leaders. 
All of the academic programs provide students with both a solid theoretical background and the practical interdisciplinary skills that are essential for success in the 21st century. 

The university’s alumni are leading key positions at government agencies, high-tech companies, and financial institutions. 

Reichman University is unique in its educational methods, which are based on an interdisciplinary approach and the teaching of information technology and global markets. It combines theory with real-world experience and provides its students with proficiencies. 

Our basic outlook, which is rooted in the twin concepts of individual freedom and responsibility, emphasizes student entrepreneurship and leadership alongside a commitment to community service.

Follow us on all social media channels >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

מטרת אוניברסיטת רייכמן (לשעבר הבינתחומי) היא להכשיר את מנהיגות העתיד של מדינת ישראל, באמצעות השכלה בינתחומית, המשלבת ידע תיאורטי מעמיק עם הכשרה מעשית, ובהנחיית סגל מרצים וחוקרים מהאוניברסיטאות המובילות בעולם ובישראל. גישתנו היא הקפדה על מצוינות במחקר ובהוראה, לצד דגש על אחריות חברתית ומעורבות בקהילה. מאז הקמתו, הצליח הבינתחומי הרצליה להיות חלוץ בתחומים רבים ולהוביל מהפכה במערכת ההשכלה הגבוהה בישראל, שאת עקבותיה ניתן לראות כיום במוסדות אקדמיים אחרים.

עקבו אחרינו בכל הרשתות החברתיות >>> https://bit.ly/3TVTCJE

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
We are an academically invigorating Preschool-through-Grade-12 independent private school based on Jewish values and identity. Thriving on two closely connected schools located on one state-of-the-art campus, we carefully nurture the youngest preschoolers and guide them, step-by-step, to become intelligent, compassionate, proactive young adults.

Our close-knit community, inspired by expert teachers and administrators, fuelled by a forward-looking curriculum, shapes independent thinkers and energetic citizens. Through our abiding belief in the combined power of intellect, kindness, and Judaism, our students see themselves in personal as well as community contexts—fostering genuine creativity, purposeful action, and enduring friendship.

The Adelson Educational Campus consists of students ranging from 18 months through High School. The Preschool/Lower School provides students from 18 months through 5th grade with a highly nurturing academic environment. The Upper School, encompassing grades 6–12, educates students to hone their critical thinking skills and prepares them for higher education. Since the Upper School began in August 2008, 130 students have received diplomas from our campus.

Adelson Campus students graduate as caring, perceptive, engaged thinkers, fully prepared for top universities at home and abroad. Equally important, they step forth with the intellectual and personal fortitude to embrace—and enhance—a world of accelerating change.

Learn more about our Lower School, Upper School, Hebrew & Judaics, College Prep, Athletics and Technology Lab.

Or come visit us in person.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Sheldon Adelson Educational Campus

The Hebrew University of Jerusalem is Israel's first university, formed in 1918 and opened in 1925. Today, there are over 23,000 students enrolled at the University, including undergraduates, master's degree students, and doctoral candidates.

The university has four campuses: Mount Scopus, The Edmond J. Safra (Givat Ram) Campus, and Ein Kerem (in Jerusalem), and Rehovot.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

Taliaz is transforming mental health care with AI-powered clinical management tools that enhance psychiatric care and streamline the mental health workflow. 
Our innovative technology empowers healthcare providers to make faster, more precise treatment decisions, reducing trial-and-error and ensuring patients receive the right care from the start. By optimizing clinical workflows, we enable practitioners to treat more patients efficiently, reduce wait times, and improve treatment engagement — all while achieving an 86% patient satisfaction rate. 

With Taliaz, personalized, effective mental health care becomes the standard.

Let’s change lives — together.

companyResolutionResult.description:
Cyera is the industry-leading AI Security Platform. As AI transforms how data is created, accessed, and used, Cyera's mission is to enable global enterprises to adopt AI at scale by securing the data that fuels it. The platform provides organizations with precise visibility, and intelligent controls to secure data everywhere - at rest, in motion, and in use, whether used by humans or agents. 

Valued at $9 billion and backed by more than $1.7 billion in funding from top-tier investors including Accel, Blackstone, Cyberstarts, Georgian, Lightspeed, and Sequoia, Cyera is trusted by a growing number of Fortune 1000 companies adopting AI across their enterprise at scale.

Powered by machine learning and lookalike targeting, YouAppi’s proprietary and proven app retargeting technology finds and retains the most profitable users.
